query: Days of Play 2026 PlayStation Plus Premium discount announcement dates details
answer:

---

## Days of Play 2026 – PlayStation Plus Premium Discount: Research Report

### Limitations Notice
**All web search and fetch tools are currently unavailable.** This report is based on my training data (with a knowledge cutoff) and historical patterns. I cannot confirm whether Days of Play 2026 has been officially announced as of today (May 21, 2026). The findings below should be treated as **historical context and pattern-based observations**, not confirmed 2026 details.

---

### Historical Pattern: Days of Play

- **Days of Play** is an annual PlayStation promotional event that Sony has run every year since 2018.
- It typically takes place in **late May through mid-June**, often spanning ~2 weeks.
- Historical dates:
  - **2023**: May 25 – June 8
  - **2024**: Late May – mid-June (approximately May 29 – June 12)
  - **2025**: Expected late May – early/mid June
- The event features discounts on **PS Plus subscriptions**, **first-party games**, **DualSense controllers**, and other accessories.

### PlayStation Plus Premium Discounts (Historical)

- During Days of Play, Sony has historically offered **25–30% discounts** on PlayStation Plus subscription tiers (Essential, Extra, and Premium).
- In **2023**, PS Plus Premium 12-month was discounted from $159.99 to approximately **$119.99** (25% off).
- In **2024**, similar discounts were offered, with PS Plus Premium seeing roughly **25% off** annual subscriptions.
- These discounts apply to **new subscriptions and renewals/upgrades** but details on stacking have varied year to year.

### Typical Announcement Pattern

- Sony usually announces Days of Play **1–2 weeks before** the sale begins, via the **PlayStation Blog** (blog.playstation.com).
- Announcements typically land in **mid-to-late May**, with the sale starting a few days later.
- The announcement includes the full list of discounted games, PS Plus deals, and hardware/accessory offers.

### What to Expect for 2026 (Based on Pattern)

- **Announcement window**: Likely mid-May 2026 (approximately May 14–21).
- **Sale window**: Likely late May to mid-June 2026 (approximately May 28 – June 11).
- **PS Plus Premium discount**: Historically 25% off, which would bring the 12-month price from ~$159.99 to ~$119.99 (assuming no price changes since last known pricing).
- Sony may have adjusted PS Plus pricing since my last data — any price changes would affect the discounted amount.

### Key Sources (Historical)

- PlayStation Blog (blog.playstation.com) — official announcement channel
- Push Square (pushsquare.com) — PlayStation-focused news outlet
- Eurogamer, IGN, and other major gaming outlets typically cover the event

---

**Recommendation**: For confirmed 2026 details, check the PlayStation Blog and major gaming news sites directly. If the event follows historical patterns, an announcement should be available around this date (May 21, 2026) or very soon.
